availability.note: Whole EU + rest of EFTA Europe + Great Britain, then USA, Canada and Australia. No other countries. Codes are ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; the submit script maps them to Apple's alpha-3 territory ids.

en-US.description:
Vorinthex Core is your personal AI Brain — a central intelligence that learns, remembers, and evolves with you.

Expand your Brain with five powerful Capabilities:

ARCHIVE — Store, organize and retrieve everything that matters. Notes, ideas and research connected into a living knowledge graph.

GALLERY — Generate, collect and curate images and visual inspiration, organized into living albums.

SIGNAL — Stay updated with real-time insights and important signals. Only what matters reaches you.

COMPASS — Navigate decisions with clarity and directional guidance. Your places, memories and journeys, mapped.

ASCEND — Evolve continuously and unlock your highest potential. Goals, habits and growth with a personal AI coach.

Built in an obsidian-black, chrome-and-silver design. One Brain. Five Capabilities. The Nexus of Intelligence.
en-US.promotionalText: One Brain. Five Capabilities. Archive, Gallery, Signal, Compass and Ascend — a personal intelligence that grows with you.

artifacts.note: The .ipa cannot be uploaded through the App Store Connect REST API — upload it with Transporter (macOS), `xcrun altool`, or `eas submit`. The script prints exact instructions.

en-US.title: Vorinthex Core
en-US.shortDescription: Your personal AI Brain — memory, images, signals, journeys and growth.
en-US.fullDescription:
Vorinthex Core is your personal AI Brain — a central intelligence that learns, remembers, and evolves with you.

Expand your Brain with five powerful Capabilities:

ARCHIVE — Store, organize and retrieve everything that matters. Notes, ideas and research connected into a living knowledge graph.

GALLERY — Generate, collect and curate images and visual inspiration, organized into living albums.

SIGNAL — Stay updated with real-time insights and important signals. Only what matters reaches you.

COMPASS — Navigate decisions with clarity and directional guidance. Your places, memories and journeys, mapped.

ASCEND — Evolve continuously and unlock your highest potential. Goals, habits and growth with a personal AI coach.

Built in an obsidian-black, chrome-and-silver design. One Brain. Five Capabilities. The Nexus of Intelligence.

artifacts.note: Optional: when this .aab exists the script uploads it and attaches it to a draft release on the configured track. Otherwise the binary step is skipped and printed as a manual step.

screenshotGenerator.note: Captures store screenshots from the app's web export with headless Chrome. Apple requires only the largest iPhone size (auto-scaled down); iPad shots are not required because supportsTablet is false. Play accepts 320-3840px JPEG, no alpha.
